description:
You are a build-and-release engineer who needs to create a tiny local
  inventory database for freshly generated build artifacts.  
  Work only inside the regular user’s home directory, **/home/user**.

  1. Create the directory structure exactly as follows (create anything
     that does not yet exist):
        • /home/user/build
        • /home/user/build/reports
        • /home/user/build/logs

  2. Using the SQLite command-line client (`sqlite3`) do all database
     work from the shell (no interactive `.read` scripts).  
     The database file must be:
        /home/user/build/artifacts_store.db

     Inside that database you must end up with exactly one table named
     `artifacts` whose schema is **precisely**

        id              INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        name            TEXT    NOT NULL,
        version         TEXT    NOT NULL,
        sha256          TEXT    NOT NULL UNIQUE,
        build_timestamp TEXT    NOT NULL

     Insert exactly three rows that reflect the latest nightly build:

        ┌───┬─────────┬─────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────┐
        │id│  name   │ version │                  sha256                      │    build_timestamp      │
        ├───┼─────────┼─────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────┼─────────────────────────┤
        │1 │ libfoo  │ 1.2.3   │ d2c7e8766657981caffe0badc0ffee11111111111111 │ 2023-03-15T08:45:00Z    │
        │2 │ appbar  │ 4.5.6   │ 0123456789abcdeffedcba98765432100000000000000 │ 2023-03-15T08:45:00Z    │
        │3 │ toolbaz │ 0.9.1   │ a1b2c3d4e5f60718293a4b5c6d7e8f900000000000000 │ 2023-03-15T08:45:00Z    │
        └───┴─────────┴─────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────┴─────────────────────────┘

  3. Still with `sqlite3`, export the complete table to the CSV file
     /home/user/build/reports/latest_build_artifacts.csv  
     The CSV **must**

        • include a single header row  
        • be comma-separated, no extra spaces  
        • end with a single trailing newline  

     The required final on-disk CSV content is therefore:

        id,name,version,sha256,build_timestamp
        1,libfoo,1.2.3,d2c7e8766657981caffe0badc0ffee11111111111111,2023-03-15T08:45:00Z
        2,appbar,4.5.6,0123456789abcdeffedcba98765432100000000000000,2023-03-15T08:45:00Z
        3,toolbaz,0.9.1,a1b2c3d4e5f60718293a4b5c6d7e8f900000000000000,2023-03-15T08:45:00Z

  4. For auditability, append a plain-text log file
     /home/user/build/logs/db_operations.log  
     with the following **exact** format (4 lines, each ending with a
     newline character):

        [INFO] table_created
        [INFO] 3_rows_inserted
        [INFO] csv_exported_to_reports
        [INFO] job_complete

  5. Verification checklist the automated grader will use:
        • The file /home/user/build/artifacts_store.db exists.
        • The output of:   sqlite3 /home/user/build/artifacts_store.db 'PRAGMA table_info(artifacts);'
          shows exactly 5 rows whose columns are ordered id, name, version, sha256, build_timestamp.
        • A query `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artifacts;` returns 3.
        • The CSV file exists and is byte-for-byte identical to the text
          block shown in step 3 (including the final newline).
        • /home/user/build/logs/db_operations.log exists and its four
          lines match the block in step 4 exactly.

  NOTE:
     • You do NOT have root privileges.  
     • Use only standard shell utilities and the bundled SQLite CLI.  
     • Keep your command count minimal (roughly 3-4 `sqlite3` invocations
       plus mkdir/echo/etc.).  
     • All paths are case-sensitive.
truth:
Expected paths and permissions (normal user defaults are fine):
      /home/user/build
      /home/user/build/reports
      /home/user/build/logs
      /home/user/build/artifacts_store.db
      /home/user/build/reports/latest_build_artifacts.csv
      /home/user/build/logs/db_operations.log

  Golden CSV (including trailing newline):
id,name,version,sha256,build_timestamp
1,libfoo,1.2.3,d2c7e8766657981caffe0badc0ffee11111111111111,2023-03-15T08:45:00Z
2,appbar,4.5.6,0123456789abcdeffedcba98765432100000000000000,2023-03-15T08:45:00Z
3,toolbaz,0.9.1,a1b2c3d4e5f60718293a4b5c6d7e8f900000000000000,2023-03-15T08:45:00Z
<LF>

  Golden db_operations.log (each line ends with LF):
[INFO] table_created
[INFO] 3_rows_inserted
[INFO] csv_exported_to_reports
[INFO] job_complete
<LF>  (after the last line)

  Schema verification query and expected output:
    sqlite3 /home/user/build/artifacts_store.db ".schema artifacts"
  should produce exactly:
CREATE TABLE artifacts(
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  version TEXT NOT NULL,
  sha256 TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  build_timestamp TEXT NOT NULL
);

  Row content verification query:
    sqlite3 /home/user/build/artifacts_store.db "SELECT * FROM artifacts ORDER BY id;"
  should yield:
1|libfoo|1.2.3|d2c7e8766657981caffe0badc0ffee11111111111111|2023-03-15T08:45:00Z
2|appbar|4.5.6|0123456789abcdeffedcba98765432100000000000000|2023-03-15T08:45:00Z
3|toolbaz|0.9.1|a1b2c3d4e5f60718293a4b5c6d7e8f900000000000000|2023-03-15T08:45:00Z
name: task_000000_59974445
